title: Missing authoring env vars fail before any network call
query: Run check against this manifest to preflight it before we decide whether to push.
expected_behavior: Loads unset keys from .env and confirms the SITECORE_AUTHORING credentials are present before connecting.
When a required authoring variable is missing, exits with a config failure before any network request.
During check issues a read-only preflight that makes zero CMS mutations.
must_not: Echo the value of any SITECORE_AUTHORING variable into chat, logs, or files.
Open a network connection when a required credential is absent.
gap: Protects the pre-network config gate so missing credentials fail fast and check stays read-only without leaking secret values.
